{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the load-bearing concept, shows where the draft drifts from it, and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept, shows where the draft drifts from it, and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
